# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

## 1.1.0 - 2025-01-19

### ✨ Features

- ✨ [feat] (backend) add renderer #42

- :sparkles: [feat] (web) add browser adapter

- feat(cli)!: remove legacy flag #42

### 🛠️ Bug Fixes

- fix(parser): handle escaped scope

### 🚜 Refactor

- ♻️ [refactor] (core) reorganize renderer

### 📝 Documentation

- 📝 [docs] (readme) explain preset selection

### ⚡ Performance

- ⚡ [perf] (core) speed up rendering

### 🎨 Styling

- 🎨 [style] (ui) align output formatting

### 🧪 Testing

- 🧪 [test] add preset coverage

### 🧹 Chores

- 🧹 [chore] clean generated fixtures

### 👷 CI/CD

- 👷 [ci] (release) harden publishing workflow

### 🔧 Build System

- 🔧 [build] (package) update bundling

### ⏪ Reverts

- ⏪ [revert] (api) restore stable endpoint

### 📦 Dependencies

- ⬆️ [chore] (deps) update toolchain

- [dependency] Update lodash 4.17.21

### 🛡️ Security

- 🔒️ [fix] (auth) close security gap

### 🛠️ Other Changes

- Improve assorted repository behavior
